mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(problem_id)) FROM voj_problems NATURAL JOIN voj_problem_category_relationships pcr NATURAL JOIN voj_problem_categories pc
problem_is_public = 1
AND problem_name LIKE "%"#{keyword}"%"
AND problem_category_id = #{problemCategoryId}

SELECT p.*, d.problem_difficulty_slug, d.problem_difficulty_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_submissions s WHERE s.problem_id = p.problem_id ) AS total_submission, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_submissions s WHERE s.problem_id = p.problem_id AND s.submission_judge_result = 'AC' ) AS accepted_submission FROM voj_problems p LEFT JOIN voj_problem_difficulty d ON d.problem_difficulty_id = p.problem_difficulty_id WHERE p.problem_id = #{problemId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.problem_id) FROM voj_problems p
JOIN voj_problem_tag_relationships ptr ON ptr.problem_id = p.problem_id
p.problem_is_public = 1
AND p.problem_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')
AND p.problem_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')
AND ptr.problem_tag_id = #{problemTagId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.problem_id, p.problem_name, p.problem_is_public, p.problem_difficulty_id, d.problem_difficulty_slug, d.problem_difficulty_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_submissions s WHERE s.problem_id = p.problem_id ) AS total_submission, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_submissions s WHERE s.problem_id = p.problem_id AND s.submission_judge_result = 'AC' ) AS accepted_submission FROM voj_problems p LEFT JOIN voj_problem_difficulty d ON d.problem_difficulty_id = p.problem_difficulty_id
JOIN voj_problem_tag_relationships ptr ON ptr.problem_id = p.problem_id
p.problem_is_public = 1
AND p.problem_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')
AND p.problem_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')
AND ptr.problem_tag_id = #{problemTagId}
ORDER BY p.problem_id LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_problems (problem_is_public, problem_name, problem_difficulty_id, problem_time_limit, problem_memory_limit, problem_description, problem_input_format, problem_output_format, problem_sample_input, problem_sample_output, problem_hint) VALUES (#{isPublic}, #{problemName}, #{problemDifficulty.problemDifficultyId}, #{timeLimit}, #{memoryLimit}, #{description}, #{inputFormat}, #{outputFormat}, #{sampleInput}, #{sampleOutput}, #{hint})
